idea-plugin.name: Ace Data Cloud MCP
idea-plugin.description:
Manage your Ace Data Cloud account via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin helps you set up the Ace Data Cloud platform MCP server with JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can check your balance, look up usage and spend, manage API keys and orders, and list services and models — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • Account Management Tools — Balance, usage, API keys, orders, tokens, services
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Balance — Check your current credit balance
  • Usage — Look up usage and spend per service
  • API Keys — List, create, and manage application API keys
  • Tokens — Manage platform tokens
  • Orders — Create and pay recharge orders
  • Services & Models — List available services and models

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Ace Data Cloud MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud platform token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
